appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md Layout Architecture section to document TopNavBar and Footer in LayoutWrapper with their visibility rules (both hidden on /admin/*)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Use Tailwind CSS utilities or globals.css for all styling. Do not use styled-jsx (<style jsx>) as it introduces an inconsistent styling pattern.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: horizontal-carousel-component uses <style jsx global> for .hide-scrollbar utility in components/ui/HorizontalCarousel.tsx (lines 88-99 and 154-165). No other component in the project uses styled-jsx. AGENTS.md says 'Tailwind CSS for styling' but doesn't explicitly prohibit styled-jsx.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'When iterating React children in wrapper components, use React.Children.toArray() or React.Children.map() instead of Array.isArray(children).'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: HorizontalCarousel uses Array.isArray(children) ternary at line 69 instead of the more robust React.Children API. This is the first wrapper component of this kind but sets a pattern others may follow.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Client-side fetch calls should check response.ok before parsing JSON. Throw or handle non-2xx responses gracefully.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Homepage page.tsx makes 5 fetch().json() calls without response.ok checks (lines 63-73). Same pattern found in football, concert, and basketball category pages. A server error would silently produce incorrect state data.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: In platform-worker skill, clarify TDD requirement: 'If picking up uncommitted work from a prior worker session, review and verify existing tests rather than strictly writing tests first. TDD applies to new implementations, not recovery of existing work.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: horizontal-carousel-component worker found pre-existing component and test files from prior session (1056c0bd) that were never committed. homepage-carousel-layout worker also didn't strictly follow TDD. Both workers marked followedProcedure: true despite not writing tests first.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate CSS class 'flex items-center' in HorizontalCarousel.tsx See All link
rejectedObservations.reason: Harmless cosmetic issue — duplicate Tailwind class has no functional impact and would be caught by optional Tailwind class deduplication linting. Not worth a convention change.
This is a development-only demo page, not user-facing. Auth requirement is acceptable and doesn't warrant a convention about test page auth rules.

rejectedObservations.observation: LayoutWrapper has duplicate boolean variables (hideTopNav and hideFooter both checking pathname.startsWith('/admin'))
rejectedObservations.reason: Intentional design for future flexibility — visibility rules for TopNavBar and Footer may diverge later. Not a convention issue.
